text:
Prediction: No

Reasoning: The current visit record primarily documents diagnoses related to cardiovascular disease (Congestive heart failure, Atrial fibrillation, Coronary atherosclerosis, Acute myocardial infarction) and Diabetes mellitus. There is no explicit evidence in the provided record (diagnoses, medications, or procedures) to indicate an existing or actively managed lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia. Therefore, based strictly on the provided evidence, there is no strong basis to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
